3049690.name: Swamp Hunter
3049690.description:
Swamp Hunter, A Creature Slayer Extraction Looter game utilizing the latest features of Unreal Engine 5. Pushing the boundaries of of political satire and hilarious social commentary to deliver a game that is almost as crazy as our real life world. Our mission is to deliver an intense, immersive, and teamplay-oriented experience that stands out and creates its own genre.

Prepare to dive into a shooter with tons of things to loot and extract with, missions to run for vendors and puzzles to solve while trying to stay alive. Ultra-detailed environments allow for total immersion and in-depth tactics.

We strongly recommend that you refer to the required specifications to ensure that your computer meets the minimum requirements to take full advantage of Swamp Hunter's full potential.
3049690.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
